title: struthanthus flexilis
intro: Struthanthus flexilis, also known as the Yellow Bird's Nest or Bird's Nest Orchid, is a rare and endemic species of orchid found in New Zealand. This epiphytic orchid has been traditionally used in Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Struthanthus flexilis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and prevent infection. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a poultice or infused in water to create a medicinal tea, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
